payload.answer: I have an existing memory that Sara is your daughter, but the new input says Sara is your niece. Please clarify whether this is the same Sara, a different Sara, or whether the previous memory should be corrected.

entity_resolution.reason: The new statement uses the same name, Sara, but gives a different family relationship than the existing memory. It is unclear whether this is the same Sara or a different person with the same name.

details: Conflict detected between existing and new family relationship statements.

repair_options: Keep the existing memory: Sara is your daughter.
Replace the existing memory with: Sara is your niece.
Create a separate memory for a different Sara who is your niece.
Mark the relationship as uncertain until clarified.
